[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A stylized illustrated character with spiky orange hair wears a light blue face covering and leans beside a white, instrument-like panel.  

The main subject is a side-profile, anime-style character with bright orange spiky hair, visible cheek and jaw, and a determined sideways gaze. A white face covering covers part of the mouth and nose area with a light blue emblem resembling a fleur-de-lis or similar decorative symbol on the front. The character also wears teal or light blue eyewear-like bands with dark outlines that extend around the face covering. The character is dressed in a dark gray garment with a high collar and a teal hood or scarf-like piece draped around the neck, with a metallic, ridged texture across the center collar area.  

The setting appears to be indoors or at least a close, mechanical-looking space, suggested by a large white panel behind and around the character. In the background there is a white rectangular surface with vertical black slots or lines on the left side, and on the right side a section of smaller symbols and markings is partially visible, resembling a control or instrument panel. The lighting is bright and even, with clean linework and strong outlines typical of digital illustration.  

Visible Text: No important visible text detected.  

Practical Summary: The image shows a close-up side view of an illustrated character with orange spiky hair and a white-and-blue face covering. The character is positioned in front of a white panel featuring black vertical slots and small, diagram-like markings.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
